languages.text: "Я собирался изменить права наследования и сделать своей преемницей Ларию. Я подозревал, что Ювенна догадалась об этом и могла вступить в сговор с врагом, чтобы избавиться от меня раньше, но доказательств было недостаточно. Если бы только у меня было больше времени... Но теперь слишком поздно, чтобы сожалеть о несбывшемся, верно?"

"I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"
languages.original_text: "Я собирался изменить права наследования и сделать своей преемницей Ларию. Я подозревал, что Ювенна догадалась об этом и могла вступить в сговор с врагом, чтобы избавиться от меня раньше, но доказательств было недостаточно. Если бы только у меня было больше времени... Но теперь слишком поздно, чтобы сожалеть о несбывшемся, верно?"

I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

"I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

"I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

"I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

languages.text: "Ich hatte vor, die Erbfolge zu ändern und Laria zu meiner Erbin zu machen. Ich vermute, Juvenna hat damit gerechnet und sich mit dem Feind verschworen, um mich loszuwerden, aber dafür gab es keine ausreichenden Beweise. Hätte ich doch nur mehr Zeit gehabt ... Aber es ist zu spät, zu bedauern, was hätte sein können, oder?"
languages.original_text: "I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich hatte vor, die Erbfolge zu ändern und Laria zu meiner Erbin zu machen. Ich vermute, Juvenna hat damit gerechnet und sich mit dem Feind verschworen, um mich loszuwerden, aber dafür gab es keine ausreichenden Beweise. Hätte ich doch nur mehr Zeit gehabt ... Aber es ist zu spät, zu bedauern, was hätte sein können, oder?"

languages.text: « Je prévoyais de modifier mon testament pour faire de Laria mon héritière. Je soupçonnais Juvenna de l'avoir deviné et d'avoir conspiré avec l'ennemi pour se débarrasser de moi avant mon heure, mais je n'en ai jamais eu la preuve formelle. Si seulement j'avais eu plus de temps... Mais l'heure n'est plus aux regrets, je suppose. »
languages.original_text: "I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: « Je prévoyais de modifier mon testament pour faire de Laria mon héritière. Je soupçonnais Juvenna de l'avoir deviné et d'avoir conspiré avec l'ennemi pour se débarrasser de moi avant mon heure, mais je n'en ai jamais eu la preuve formelle. Si seulement j'avais eu plus de temps... Mais l'heure n'est plus aux regrets, je suppose. »

languages.text: «Tenía intención de enmendar la sucesión y nombrar heredera a Laria. Sospechaba que Juvenna lo había intuido y que tal vez había conspirado con el enemigo para eliminarme antes de que pudiera hacerlo, pero me faltaban pruebas. Si hubiera tenido más tiempo, habría... Bueno, supongo que es tarde para lamentar lo que podría haber sido, ¿no cree?».
languages.original_text: "I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: «Tenía intención de enmendar la sucesión y nombrar heredera a Laria. Sospechaba que Juvenna lo había intuido y que tal vez había conspirado con el enemigo para eliminarme antes de que pudiera hacerlo, pero me faltaban pruebas. Si hubiera tenido más tiempo, habría... Bueno, supongo que es tarde para lamentar lo que podría haber sido, ¿no cree?».

languages.text: "Veraseti değiştirmeye ve Laria'yı vârisim yapmaya niyetliydim. Juvenna'nın da bunu tahmin ettiğinden ve benden bir an önce kurtulmak için düşmanla iş birliği yapmış olabileceğinden şüpheleniyordum ancak elimde yeterli kanıt yoktu. Keşke daha fazla zamanım olsaydı... Fakat olabilecekler için pişman olmak için artık çok geç, öyle değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: "Veraseti değiştirmeye ve Laria'yı vârisim yapmaya niyetliydim. Juvenna'nın da bunu tahmin ettiğinden ve benden bir an önce kurtulmak için düşmanla iş birliği yapmış olabileceğinden şüpheleniyordum ancak elimde yeterli kanıt yoktu. Keşke daha fazla zamanım olsaydı... Fakat olabilecekler için pişman olmak için artık çok geç, öyle değil mi?"

languages.text: “我本打算修改继承顺位，指定菈丽雅为我的继承人。我怀疑尤文娜已经察觉到了，甚至可能与敌人合谋，想要尽快除掉我，但当时证据不足。要是再多给我些时间……不过现在后悔也没用了。”
languages.original_text: "I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: “我本打算修改继承顺位，指定菈丽雅为我的继承人。我怀疑尤文娜已经察觉到了，甚至可能与敌人合谋，想要尽快除掉我，但当时证据不足。要是再多给我些时间……不过现在后悔也没用了。”

languages.text: 「私は後継者を変更し、ラリアを自分の後継者にするつもりでした。ユベナは私の意図を察知していた可能性があり、敵と共謀して私を早く排除しようとしたのかもしれませんが、証拠は不十分でした。もしもう少し時間があれば…でも、もしもこうならなかったと後悔しても、もう遅いですね。」
languages.original_text: "I intended to amend the succession and name Laria as my heir. I suspected that Juvenna had guessed as much and may have conspired with the enemy to be rid of me sooner, but there was insufficient proof. If only I had had more time... But it is too late to regret what might have been, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: 「私は後継者を変更し、ラリアを自分の後継者にするつもりでした。ユベナは私の意図を察知していた可能性があり、敵と共謀して私を早く排除しようとしたのかもしれませんが、証拠は不十分でした。もしもう少し時間があれば…でも、もしもこうならなかったと後悔しても、もう遅いですね。」
